items.title: Top wins
items.detail: Ben-Hur, Titanic and The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King share the 11-win record.

items.title: Timeline
items.detail: 1929 first ceremony, 1953 first televised ceremony, 2002 Dolby Theatre era, 2027 99th ceremony.

items.title: Affiliate base
items.detail: Hotel, streaming, museum, merchandise and Los Angeles travel cards can be powered by JSON fields later.

items.title: Data expansion
items.detail: Add nominees, hosts, countries, posters and clips inside the existing oscars-*.json files.
